once the bug is fixed, you can import this to restore your game.

Here's the data we tried to save. You can import this through the

exact.source: Welcome to Swarm Simulator. Starting with just a few larvae and a small pile of meat, grow a massive swarm of giant bugs.
exact.target: 欢迎来到模拟虫群。开局只有几只幼虫和一小堆肉，带领它们一步步走向伟大的虫群吧。

exact.source: Your brood starts its life with a small pile of meat and a single larva-producing hatchery. Larvae mutate into other units. Begin your growth by using your meat and larvae to hatch some
exact.target: 您的种族开局只有一小堆肉和一个产生幼虫的孵化场。幼虫可以突变为其他单位。请先使用肉和幼虫来孵化一些

exact.source: You lead a small brood of worker drones. Drones gather meat. Use this meat to build more drones and expand your brood.
exact.target: 您领导着一小群工蜂。工蜂可以收集肉。使用它们收集到的肉来孵化更多工蜂，壮大您的种群。

exact.source: You lead a small brood of worker drones. Once you have plenty of meat, upgrade your hatchery to produce more larvae by selecting '
exact.target: 您领导着一小群工蜂。当您拥有足够的肉以后，选择
并花费相应的肉，以升级您的孵化场。

exact.source: appears when you have enough meat to upgrade your hatchery.
exact.target: 图标将在您有足够的肉升级孵化场时出现。

exact.source: You lead a small brood of worker drones. They long for a
exact.target: 您领导着一小群工蜂。它们渴望拥有一位

exact.source: . You must sacrifice many drones to hatch a queen, but once born, your queen will slowly hatch drones without consuming meat or larvae.
exact.target: 。您必须牺牲许多工蜂才能孵化一位虫后，虫后可以缓慢地孵化工蜂，并且不需要消耗肉或者幼虫。

exact.source: Hatch more queens to grow your swarm. Hatching drones with the "Twin Drones" upgrade will allow you to rapidly raise more queens.
exact.target: 孵化更多的虫后来壮大您的虫群。进行“双重工蜂”升级后，孵化工蜂将更有效率，使您可以更快地孵化虫后。

exact.source: Queens have rapidly grown your swarm, and your growth demands more
exact.target: 虫后使您的虫群快速增长，因此，您需要更多的

exact.source: by building military units - swarmlings or stingers.
exact.target: 吧————跳虫或者兵蜂都可以。

exact.source: Your warriors have slowly begun securing territory. Continue expanding your military.
exact.target: 您的战士们开始缓慢地占领领土了。请继续扩张军队。

exact.source: Your warriors have captured a lot of territory, and soon you can secure your first expansion. Expansions increase larva production. Select '
exact.target: 您的战士们占领了大量领土，您可以进行扩张了。扩张后幼虫产量将增加。请选择

exact.source: Expansion is the key to growing your swarm rapidly. Build a large military to expand your territory and produce more larvae. Build more queens and, eventually, nests to produce more meat for your military.
exact.target: 扩张是壮大虫群的不二法门。建立一支大军来占领更多领土，产生更多幼虫。同时，孵化更多虫后，以及之后的虫巢等可以产生更多的肉来供养军队。

exact.source: Your swarm has grown large enough to
exact.target: 您的虫群已经大到可以进行

exact.source: - gain even greater power and restart on a new world! Take a look at the
exact.target: 了————可以获得更强大的力量，并在一个新的世界重新开始！看看

exact.source: Congratulations on your first ascension! Mutations can make your swarm much more powerful. Mutagen you haven't spent yet will produce some larvae - don't spend it all right away!
exact.target: 恭喜您完成了首次飞升！突变使您的虫群变得更加强大。还未花费的突变原可以产生一些幼虫————所以别马上把突变原一口气全花完了！

exact.source: Exciting changes are coming to Swarm Simulator soon!
Insects are too icky, so we're changing our name. Also, we'll require graphics to play.
exact.target: 虫子们太不招人喜欢，所以我们准备把名字全给换了。另外，我们也希望这个游戏有图像。

exact.source: Try out the upcoming changes now!
exact.target: 现在就尝试一下新的变化吧！

exact.source: Swarm Simulator is now Kitten Klicker!
exact.target: 模拟虫群变成了喵拟喵群！

exact.source: Insects were too icky, so we've changed our name. Also, we now require graphics to play. Thanks to
exact.target: 虫子们太不招人喜欢，所以我们把名字全给换了。另外，这个游戏也有图像了。感谢

exact.source: for providing graphics. Enjoy the new game!
exact.target: 提供图像。享受崭新的游戏吧！

exact.source: Click here if you hate kittens, you monster.
exact.target: 如果您竟然会讨厌喵星人的话，就点这里吧，愚蠢的蓝星人。

exact.source: I hope you enjoyed yesterday's April Fools joke!
exact.target: 希望您喜欢昨天的愚人节玩笑！

exact.source: Click here to keep the kitten pictures.
exact.target: 点击此处可以保留喵星人的图像。

exact.source: To remove them later, go to the options screen and click "Clear all extra styling/graphics".
exact.target: 如果您之后想要移除它们，只需进入选项界面，点击“清除所有额外的样式/图像”即可。

exact.source: You found the debug page! Too bad it only works in the development build.
exact.target: 您发现了DEBUG界面！很遗憾它只能在开发版本中使用。

exact.source: . If your saved game wasn't copied, this page will help.
exact.target: 。如果您的存档未被复制过来，可以使用此页面来完成。

exact.source: Copy your saved game to www.swarmsim.com
exact.target: 将旧存档复制到www.swarmsim.com(与汉化版无关)

exact.source: Or, export your saved game data below
exact.target: 或者您也可以复制下方的存档数据

exact.source: Meat is delicious. All of your swarm's creatures eat meat.
exact.target: 肉相当美味可口。虫群中的所有生物都吃肉。

exact.source: The children of your swarm. These young creatures morph into other adult units.
exact.target: 虫群的幼生体。它们可以进化成其他的成熟单位。

exact.source: Drones are the lowest class of worker in your swarm. They continuously gather meat to feed your swarm.
exact.target: 工蜂是虫群最基础的工人单位。它们持续收集肉以维持虫群的温饱。

exact.source: Queens rule over your swarm's workers.
exact.target: 虫后管理着虫群的工人。

exact.source: Nests provide space and support for your swarm's queens.
exact.target: 虫巢为虫后提供空间和支持。

exact.source: Your first nest will take a long time to regenerate the queens sacrificed to build it. Consider hatching more queens first.
exact.target: 首次建造虫巢后需要很长的时间才能补回花费的虫后。请先考虑孵化更多的虫后吧。

exact.source: Greater queens rule over the lesser queens of very large swarms.
exact.target: 大虫后管理着较大的虫群中低阶的虫后。

exact.source: Your first few greater queens will take a long time to regenerate the nests sacrificed to build them. Consider building more nests first.
exact.target: 首次孵化大虫后后需要很长的时间才能补回花费的虫巢。请先考虑建造更多的虫巢吧。

exact.source: Hives are huge structures crafted from meat and the bodies of thousands of queens. They allow your swarm to grow even faster.
exact.target: 主巢由大量肉和虫后构建而成。它们可以使虫群更快地成长。

exact.source: Your first few hives will take a long time to regenerate the greater queens sacrificed to build them. Consider hatching more greater queens first.
exact.target: 首次建造主巢后需要很长的时间才能补回花费的大虫后。请先考虑孵化更多的大虫后吧。

exact.source: Hive queens oversee the production of hives in the largest swarms.
exact.target: 主巢虫后监管着最大的虫群中主巢的生产流程。

exact.source: Your first few hive queens will take a long time to regenerate the hives sacrificed to build them. Consider building more hives first.
exact.target: 首次孵化主巢虫后后需要很长的时间才能补回花费的主巢。请先考虑建造更多的主巢吧。

exact.source: The mightiest creature to rule over your swarm so far.
exact.target: 目前为止最强大的虫群管理者。

exact.source: Your prophets foresee the guidance of a higher power, a greater being - yet, the heavens have fallen silent.
exact.target: 您的先知们预见到了一个更加强大，更加伟大的存在，它正在指引着您————诸天俱寂。

exact.source: Neurons are the building blocks of a greater hive intelligence.
exact.target: 主巢神经元是更强大的主巢心智的组成部分。

exact.source: Groups of neurons begin to exert mild psychic powers, influencing the minds of lesser creatures in your swarm.
exact.target: 成团成簇的主巢神经元开始使用温和的精神力来影响虫群中更低阶的生物。

exact.source: Networking your hive's neurons allows them to coordinate their actions, much as a single entity would.
exact.target: 主巢神经元开始形成网络，这使它们的步调更加一致，更像是一个整体了。

exact.source: Your neural networks have finally formed a single greater intelligence, primitive though it may be. The psychic powers of lesser hive minds are great enough to directly control several hundred lesser members of your swarm.
exact.target: 主巢网络终于形成了强大的主巢心智。尽管它还比较幼小，但小主巢心智的精神力足以直接控制虫群中极大量的低阶生物

exact.source: Mature hive minds control thousands of lesser members of your swarm, and their capacity for intelligent planning is dramatically improved.
exact.target: 成熟的主巢心智可以控制虫群中更多的低阶生物，而且它们智能规划的能力也大大提升了。

exact.source: Multiple hive minds merge their collective consciousness into a single greater being.
exact.target: 大量主巢心智将它们的意识融合到了一起，形成了更强大的存在。

exact.source: The Overmind psychically controls the actions of every member of your swarm, including all of the lesser hive minds. Building more physical manifestations of the Overmind merely increases its influence; all belong to the same being, the same greater intelligence. Your swarm now exists to serve the will of its Overmind.
exact.target: 主宰可以操控虫群的一切，包括所有主巢心智。建造更多的主宰只是让它变得更加强大，但主宰只有一个。您的虫群从现在起为主宰而生。

exact.source: Eternity lies ahead of us, and behind. Have you drunk your fill?
exact.target: 您的身前和身后都是永恒。您满足了吗？

exact.source: Your swarm's smallest and weakest warriors. They use their teeth and claws to attack foes, and can be vicious in large numbers.
exact.target: 虫群最小，也是最弱的战士。它们使用爪子和利齿攻击敌人，成群结队时相当凶猛。

exact.source: Weak flying warriors. They roam in packs, attacking any threats with venomous stingers.
exact.target: 弱小的飞行战士。它们成群结队行动，使用毒刺攻击敌人。

exact.source: Terrifying eight-legged beasts who leap upon their prey, ensnare it in sticky traps, and finally liquify it into a delicious beverage.
exact.target: 可怕的八脚野兽，它们会扑向猎物，将猎物用丝包裹，最后把猎物变为美味的饮料。

exact.source: These hated creatures feast on the blood of their victims, and spread disease to larger prey they cannot kill outright.
exact.target: 这些讨厌的生物会享用猎物的血液，对于更大的猎物，虽然无法杀死对方，但还会向对方传播疾病。

exact.source: Groups of hungry locusts devour any creature that makes the mistake of standing in their way.
exact.target: 饥饿的蝗虫群将吞噬任何不小心挡在它们面前的生物。

exact.source: The hard shell of the roach makes it a fearsome opponent; it is nearly impossible to kill.
exact.target: 没有谁想要面对可怕的蟑螂，它们的外壳太坚硬了，几乎无法被杀死。

exact.source: The larger, and more fearsome, cousin of the arachnomorph.
exact.target: 蜘蛛的表亲，更大，更可怕。

exact.source: Swift wormlike creatures with hundreds of legs and an extremely venomous bite.
exact.target: 迅捷的百足虫，口器中有剧毒。

exact.source: An advanced cousin of the stinger, wasps are far more aggressive and much better hunters.
exact.target: 兵蜂的高级表亲，黄蜂更凶猛，更强大。

exact.source: Huge burrowing worms, devourers appear from beneath the earth to swallow their prey before it can react.
exact.target: 吞噬者是巨大的埋地蠕虫，它们从地底接近猎物，并在猎物还没反应过来之前就将其吞噬。

exact.source: Goons cannot fly on their own, but instead use metal to construct powerful flying exoskeletons that rule the skies.
exact.target: 暴徒自己无法飞行，但它们使用金属构造了强大的飞行装甲，这使它们成为了天空之主。

exact.source: Allows your larvae to encase themselves within cocoons. Cocooned larvae cannot mutate into other units, and can still be cloned by Clone Larvae. You may cocoon and uncocoon your larvae whenever you wish.
exact.target: 使幼虫可以进行结茧。虫茧状态下的幼虫无法突变为其他单位，但仍然可以被克隆幼虫克隆。您可以在任意时刻结茧或破茧。
虫后可以产生更多工蜂。
虫巢可以产生更多虫后。
大虫后可以产生更多虫巢。
主巢可以产生更多大虫后。
主巢虫后可以产生更多主巢。

exact.source: Hive empresses produce more hive queens.
exact.target: 主巢女皇可以产生更多主巢虫后。
神经元先知可以产生更多主巢女皇。
主巢神经元可以产生更多神经元先知。

exact.source: Neural clusters produce more hive neurons.
exact.target: 神经元簇可以产生更多主巢神经元。

exact.source: Hive networks produce more neural clusters.
exact.target: 主巢网络可以产生更多神经元簇。

exact.source: Lesser hive minds produce more hive networks.
exact.target: 小主巢心智可以产生更多主巢网络。

exact.source: Hive minds produce more lesser hive minds.
exact.target: 主巢心智可以产生更多小主巢心智。
高级心智可以产生更多主巢心智。
主宰可以产生更多高级心智。
主宰 II可以产生更多主宰。

exact.source: Overmind IIIs produce more overmind IIs.
exact.target: 主宰 III可以产生更多主宰 II。

exact.source: Overmind IVs produce more overmind IIIs.
exact.target: 主宰 IV可以产生更多主宰 III。

exact.source: Overmind Vs produce more overmind IVs.
exact.target: 主宰 V可以产生更多主宰 IV。

exact.source: Overmind VIs produce more overmind Vs.
exact.target: 主宰 VI可以产生更多主宰 V。

exact.source: Multiple drones hatch from each larva. (This does not affect queen production.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以孵化更多工蜂。(不影响虫后产量。

exact.source: Multiple queens hatch from each larva. (This does not affect nest production.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以孵化更多虫后。(不影响虫巢产量。

exact.source: Multiple nests are constructed from each larva. (This does not affect greater queen production.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以建造更多虫巢。(不影响大虫后产量。

exact.source: Multiple greater queens hatch from each larva. (This does not affect hive production.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以孵化更多大虫后。(不影响主巢产量。

exact.source: Multiple hives are constructed from each larva. (This does not affect hive queen production.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以建造更多主巢。(不影响主巢虫后产量。

exact.source: Multiple hive queens hatch from each larva. (This does not affect hive empress production.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以孵化更多主巢虫后。(不影响主巢女皇产量。

exact.source: Multiple hive empresses hatch from each larva. (This does not affect neuroprophet production.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以孵化更多主巢女皇。(不影响神经元先知产量。

exact.source: Multiple neuroprophets hatch from each larva. (This does not affect hive neuron production.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以孵化更多神经元先知。(不影响主巢神经元产量。

exact.source: Multiple hive neurons are created from each larva. (This does not affect neural cluster production.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以产生更多主巢神经元。(不影响神经元簇产量。

exact.source: Multiple neural clusters are created from each larva. (This does not affect hive network production.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以产生更多神经元簇。(不影响主巢网络产量。

exact.source: Multiple hive networks are created from each larva. (This does not affect lesser hive mind production.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以产生更多主巢网络。(不影响小主巢心智产量。

exact.source: Multiple lesser hive minds are created from each larva. (This does not affect hive mind production.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以产生更多小主巢心智。(不影响主巢心智产量。

exact.source: Multiple hive minds are created from each larva. (This does not affect arch-mind production.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以产生更多主巢心智。(不影响高级心智产量。

exact.source: Multiple arch-minds are created from each larva. (This does not affect overmind production.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以产生更多高级心智。(不影响主宰产量。

exact.source: Multiple overminds are created from each larva. (This does not affect overmind II production.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以产生更多主宰。(不影响主宰 II产量。

exact.source: Multiple overmind IIs are created from each larva. (This does not affect overmind III production.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以产生更多主宰 II。(不影响主宰 III产量。

exact.source: Multiple overmind IIIs are created from each larva. (This does not affect overmind IV production.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以产生更多主宰 III。(不影响主宰 IV产量。

exact.source: Multiple overmind IVs are created from each larva. (This does not affect overmind V production.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以产生更多主宰 IV。(不影响主宰 V产量。

exact.source: Multiple overmind Vs are created from each larva. (This does not affect overmind VI production.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以产生更多主宰 V。(不影响主宰 VI产量。

exact.source: Multiple overmind VIs are created from each larva.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以产生更多主宰 VI。

exact.source: Multiple swarmlings hatch from each larva.
exact.target: 每只幼虫可以孵化更多跳虫。

exact.source: Dramatically increase both your swarmlings' meat cost and territory captured.
exact.target: 极大地增加跳虫的肉花费和它占领的领土数量。

exact.source: Dramatically increase both your stingers' meat cost and territory captured.

exact.target: 极大地增加暴徒的肉花费和它占领的领土数量。

exact.source: Build your first nexus, which generates energy and allows you to cast basic spells.
exact.target: 建造第一个枢纽，它可以产生能量，并使您可以施放基础法术。

exact.source: Build your second nexus, which generates more energy and unlocks several more special abilities.
exact.target: 建造第二个枢纽，它可以产生更多能量，并解锁更多的特殊能力。

exact.source: Build your third nexus, generating even more energy and unlocking more advanced spells.
exact.target: 建造第三个枢纽，它可以产生更多能量，并解锁更高级的法术。

exact.source: Build your fourth nexus, generating even more energy and unlocking some of the most advanced spells available to your swarm.
exact.target: 建造第四个枢纽，它可以产生更多能量，并解锁最高级的法术。

exact.source: Build your fifth and final nexus. All spells and abilities are unlocked. Your spellcasters cannot channel energy from more than five nexus; this is the limit of their power.
exact.target: 建造第五个，也是最后一个枢纽。所有的法术和特殊能力都解锁了。您的施法者们无法再从更多的枢纽中获得能量，这超出了他们的能力范围。

exact.source: Each cocoon is a larva encased within a protective shell. Larvae can freely enter and leave their cocoons, but cannot be transformed into other units while cocooned.
exact.target: 每个虫茧中都有一只幼虫。幼虫可以随时结茧和破茧，结茧时无法转化成其他单位。

exact.source: Clone Larvae clones cocoons as if they were normal larvae. Cocoon your larvae intended for cloning to avoid accidentally spending them.
exact.target: 克隆幼虫时可以连着虫茧中的幼虫一起克隆。因此，您可以将想要克隆的幼虫结茧，以避免意外将它们花费在其他地方。

exact.source: Your swarm's military captures territory, fueling your expansion.
exact.target: 您的虫群的军队可以占领领土，帮助您进行扩张。

exact.source: Bats empower all of your swarm's energy-based abilities.
exact.target: 蝙蝠可以强化虫群所有能量相关的能力。

exact.source: Lepidoptera are mysterious creatures, with furry bodies and large wings, emerging from their dens only at night. The lepidoptera are attracted to the light of your nightbugs, and energy is attracted to the lepidoptera.
exact.target: 月亮蛾是拥有毛绒绒身体和巨大翅膀的神秘生物，只在夜晚离开巢穴。月亮蛾被夜虫的光亮所吸引，而它同时又吸引了能量。

exact.source: Nightbugs wriggle and glow when exposed to the energy of your nexus. Gather nightbugs near your nexus to store additional energy.
exact.target: 夜虫在接触到枢纽的能量时会蠕动并发光。收集枢纽附近的夜虫可以让您存储更多的能量。

exact.source: Energy frozen into a solid form. Crystals can be thawed and used as energy at any time. Unlike energy, crystals have no maximum, and are kept when ascending.
exact.target: 它是能量固化的产物。水晶可以随时融化用作能量。与能量不同的是，水晶没有上限，飞升时也仍然保留。

exact.source: Swarm Simulator's developer appreciates your support - thank you!
exact.target: 模拟虫群的开发者感谢您的支持————谢谢您！

exact.source: Please log in to buy crystals: More... > Options
exact.target: 请登录后再购买水晶：更多……>选项

exact.source: Nexus are the focal points for the energy needed to cast spells and use special abilities.
exact.target: 枢纽是施放法术和使用特殊能力所需能量的焦点。

exact.source: Drawing energy from multiple nexus is powerful but difficult - each nexus is more expensive than the last, and ultimately there is a limit to the number of nexus your spellcasters can utilize.
exact.target: 从多个枢纽汲取能量可以让您变得更加强大，但这十分困难————每个枢纽都比上一个更加昂贵，而且施法者可以利用的枢纽数量也是有限的。

exact.source: Energy is consumed to use special abilities.
exact.target: 使用特殊能力需要消耗能量。

exact.source: Summon a mirrored copy of your army. Unlike Clone Larvae, this ability has no cap.
exact.target: 召唤军队的镜像。不像克隆幼虫，此能力没有上限。

exact.source: Mutagen cannot be used while inactive. Ascend to begin a new swarm, resetting most of your units and upgrades, but activating all of your mutagen. Active mutagen allows powerful upgrades.
exact.target: 未激活的突变原无法使用。进行飞升后将以新的虫群重新开始，重置绝大多数的单位和升级数量，但同时也将激活所有突变原。激活突变原可以获得强大的升级。

exact.source: Allows mutation, increasing the power of each member of your swarm.
exact.target: 它可以触发突变，增加虫群中每个成员的力量。

exact.source: To activate mutagen, your swarm must
exact.target: 想要激活突变原，您的虫群必须进行

exact.source: - restart on a new world. Space travel is too harsh for most of your swarm, but mutagen strengthens a few of your swarm's larvae for the trip to their new planet. All the descendents of these larvae - your new swarm - will benefit from mutagen's power.
exact.target: ————从新的世界重新开始。太空旅行对虫群的大部分单位来说过于严苛了，只有经过突变原强化的一小部分幼虫可以完成它们的旅途。这些幼虫的所有后代————也就是您的新虫群————都能受益于突变原的力量。
飞升————激活突变原，重新开始

exact.source: Respec - refund mutagen, but reset ascension cost
exact.target: 洗点————返还突变原，但重置飞升花费

exact.source: Raw mutagen produces larvae that doesn't benefit from hatchery mutations. Don't spend all your mutagen too early!
exact.target: 直接由突变原产生的幼虫不受此项加成。不要太早把所有突变原花完了！

exact.source: Increases larvae production, and increases the cost of unlocking other mutagen powers.
exact.target: 增加幼虫产量，并增加解锁其他突变原升级的花费。

exact.source: Increases the power of all abilities, and increases the cost of unlocking other mutagen powers.
exact.target: 增加所有能力的效果，并增加解锁其他突变原升级的花费。

exact.source: Increases Clone Larvae's maximum, and increases the cost of unlocking other mutagen powers.
exact.target: 增加克隆幼虫的上限，并增加解锁其他突变原升级的花费。

exact.source: Increases Swarmwarp's power, and increases the cost of unlocking other mutagen powers.
exact.target: 增加虫群跃迁的效果，并增加解锁其他突变原升级的花费。

exact.source: Increases the power of Larvae Rush, Meat Rush, and Territory Rush, and increases the cost of unlocking other mutagen powers.
exact.target: 增加幼虫冲刺，肉冲刺和领土冲刺的效果，并增加解锁其他突变原升级的花费。

exact.source: When a hatchery or expansion spawns mutagen, more mutagen is generated. Increases the cost of unlocking other mutagen powers.
exact.target: 增加升级孵化场或扩张获得的突变原数量，并增加解锁其他突变原升级的花费。

exact.source: Increases the chance of spawning mutagen when buying a hatchery or expansion, and increases the cost of unlocking other mutagen powers.
exact.target: 增加升级孵化场或扩张获得突变原的概率，并增加解锁其他突变原升级的花费。

exact.source: Increases energy generated, but also increases the energy cost of ascending. Increases the cost of unlocking other mutagen powers.
exact.target: 增加能量产量，但同时也增加飞升的能量花费，并增加解锁其他突变原升级的花费。

exact.source: Increases the amount of territory captured, and increases the cost of unlocking other mutagen powers.
exact.target: 增加占领的领土数量，并增加解锁其他突变原升级的花费。

exact.source: Increases production of all meat units, and increases the cost of unlocking other mutagen powers.
exact.target: 增加所有肉相关单位的产量，并增加解锁其他突变原升级的花费。
已发送找回密码的邮件。

exact.source: Auto-export every 15 minutes and before closing
exact.target: 在游戏运行时，每15分钟自动导出至在线存储

exact.source: Check for new online saved data
exact.target: 检查新的在线存储数据

exact.source: Import online saved data (replaces your current game
exact.target: 从在线存储数据中导入存档(将覆盖现有存档
无法自动导出至在线存储

exact.source: because nothing's changed since the last export
exact.target: ，因为数据与上次导出存档没有任何区别

exact.source: because this is a new game
because the online save is newer than the one you're playing
exact.target: 因为在线存储的数据比您目前游玩的存档数据要更加新

exact.source: We'll only send you account recovery/lost password emails.
exact.target: 我们只会向您发送找回密码的邮件。

exact.source: Sync saved data with other devices
exact.target: 与其他设备同步存储数据

exact.source: Show more detailed numbers for each of your units, and allow customizing when each upgrade notifier appears.
exact.target: 显示每个单位更详细的数据，并且可以自定义每个升级提醒的出现方式。

exact.source: Reduce this setting if the game is slowing down your computer. This doesn't affect gameplay; your units won't produce resources any faster or slower.
exact.target: 如果此游戏使电脑的运行速度变慢了，可以减少此项的数值。调整帧数不会影响产量。
(由于技术原因，后缀无法汉化，如果看不懂的话，请换成科学计数法)基于
清除所有额外的样式/图像

exact.source: To export, click the text above and
exact.target: 想要导出的话，请点击上方的文本并进行

exact.source: (ctrl-c). To import, click the text and paste (ctrl-v) your exported data.
exact.target: (ctrl-c)。想要导入的话，请点击上方的文本并将您的存储数据粘贴进去(ctrl-v)。

exact.source: It's normal for imported saves to have more units than you exported with. Your swarm continues its work even after saved data is exported/before it's imported.
exact.target: 一般来说，导入以后都会比导入时拥有更多的单位。因为您的虫群在此期间仍然在辛勤工作着。

exact.source: Where is Swarm Simulator's data saved?
exact.target: 模拟虫群的数据保存在哪里？

exact.source: Swarm Simulator saves your progress in your browser's localstorage, cookies, and Flash (SWF) storage. Your saved game will be loaded if it's found in any one of these sources. This is done to avoid accidentally losing your saved data; it's not intended to track you or otherwise invade your privacy. The 'wipe all saved data' button below will clear all three storage locations.
exact.target: 模拟虫群在本地存储，cookies和Flash (SWF) 存储上存储数据。只要在任何一处找到了存储数据，就可以载入存档。这么做是为了防止丢失数据，并非是为了侵犯隐私之类的。下方的“清除所有存储数据”按钮将清除这三个地方的所有相关数据。

exact.source: Wipe all saved data and start over
exact.target: 清除所有存储数据并重新开始

exact.source: Swarm Simulator, like many websites, uses Google Analytics to track actions you take while playing. We use this data to improve the game. Feel free to
exact.target: 模拟虫群跟很多其他网站一样，使用了谷歌分析来收集游戏行为数据。我们将使用这些数据来改进游戏。您当然也可以自行

exact.source: How Google uses data when you use our partners' sites or apps
exact.target: 谷歌将如何使用相关数据

exact.target: 模拟虫群属于开源软件，查阅

联系模拟虫群的开发者

exact.source: is the best way to reach the developer! I read everything written there, even if I don't always reply.
exact.target: 是联系开发者最好的途径！我会阅读所有的帖子，但不一定会回复。

exact.source: Did you play on the old website, swarmsim.github.io, and you're looking for your saved progress?
exact.target: 您是否在旧网站swarmsim.github.io下玩过游戏，并想把存档转移过来？

exact.source: Did you lose your saved progress some other way?
exact.target: 您是否由于某些原因而丢失了存档？
需要向作者发送电子邮件吗？

exact.source: Please email me if you're having trouble with a crystal purchase, or if you're reporting an exploitable bug.
exact.target: 如果您无法完成水晶购买，或者是发现了可能被恶意利用的BUG，请通过电子邮件联系我。

exact.source: I probably won't reply. Please post on Reddit instead.
exact.target: 我可能不会回复，请在Reddit上发帖。

exact.source: Swarm Simulator is run in one human's free time. I love you and your feedback, I really do - but email is stressful, and takes more of my limited time than you think. The Reddit community really is very helpful!
exact.target: 模拟虫群只是我利用业余时间完成的作品。我当然希望获得您的反馈，真的————但电子邮件会让人紧张，会花掉我更多的时间。Reddit社区真的帮了我很多！
